entry.title: IDC 91003123D0001 (P00010) awarded to MAXIMUS EDUCATION, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF P00010 IS TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS OF CLAUSE FAR 52.204-30 FEDERAL ACQUISITION SUPPLY CHAIN SECURITY ACT ORDERS - PROHIBITION BY FULL TEXT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00014 IS TO REVISE THE GO-LIVE AND PRODUCTION READINESS MILESTONES AND DELIVERABLE DUE DATES WITHIN THE CONTRACT. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO INCORPORATES THE REQUIREMENTS OF CR 6924 - USDS - BUSINESS REQUIREMENTS CHANGE 2.
